message:
feat(ffs-ondisk): add SystemTime helpers + inode edge-case tests (bd-3qq)

Add to_system_time() and convenience methods (atime_system_time, etc.)
for converting ext4 timestamp pairs to std::time::SystemTime. Include
10 new edge-case tests covering 128-byte inodes, truncated data,
extended timestamps, uid/gid high bits, and file type detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
